blockingIssues.description: Final evidence artifact is anchored to revision 756ec61dfd0a064d538b4adb912fd8a7ae6e2cc9 but still lacks immutable same-SHA remote check-run IDs/URLs for lint, vitest, pytest, and playwright, so required-check end-state is not proven in remote merge-gate context for that revision.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require an explicit same-SHA remote check-run proof step (IDs/URLs for lint, vitest, pytest, playwright on the asserted revision) before marking final confidence-gate evidence complete.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: confidence-final-required-check-evidence-and-stability review reports the artifact as missing immutable same-SHA check-run evidence despite claiming required-check readiness.
